candidate_llm_application: Bonsai stylized-aging distillation: small student LLM from large teacher with (1) KL logit-matching, (2) stylistic-aging loss penalizing absence of teacher hedging/cross-reference/long-context markers, (3) iterative weight-wiring schedule shifting weight-magnitude positions toward target distribution at fixed intervals.

results.title: Shaping and styling Bonsai — Bonsai Empire
results.rationale: Source-domain bonsai styling page; no LLM/distillation content. Functional equivalence near zero against the LLM application.

results.title: Bonsai — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Encyclopedia entry on bonsai art; no overlap with stylized-aging distillation in LLM space.

results.title: Wiring Bonsai trees — Bonsai Empire
results.rationale: Horticultural wiring guide; lexical 'wiring' is metaphorical and not the iterative weight-wiring schedule of the LLM-side concept.

results.title: Counterfactual LLM Framework for Rhetorical Style (2025/12)
results.rationale: Provides rhetorical-style measurement via counterfactuals — useful as a measurement primitive, but does NOT propose a distillation loss term combining stylistic-aging with iterative weight-wiring. Functional gap: the paper measures style; candidate prescribes loss + scheduled weight redistribution. Below 0.7 threshold.

results.title: Do LLMs write like humans? (2024/10)
results.rationale: Studies LLM rhetorical/grammatical fingerprints empirically; provides evidence that stylistic differences exist, but no distillation method, no aging-form loss, no weight-wiring schedule. Functional equivalence below 0.7.

results.title: Survey of On-Policy Distillation (2026/4)
results.rationale: Survey notes stylistic tokens dominate distillation signal without correction — diagnoses a related problem but does not implement the candidate's tri-part loss (KL + stylistic-aging + iterative weight-wiring schedule). The candidate adds an explicit projection-of-perceived-age objective plus periodic weight-magnitude shifting, neither of which is the survey's recommendation. Below 0.7.

results.title: Self-Distilled Reasoner On-Policy (2026)
results.rationale: On-policy self-distillation for reasoning; no stylistic-aging loss, no scheduled weight-wiring. Below 0.7.

results.title: KD + Dataset Distillation Survey (2025/4)
results.rationale: General survey of KD and dataset distillation; lists open challenges including stylistic preservation but does not propose the bonsai-style aging loss nor an iterative weight-wiring schedule. Below 0.7.

summary.notes: Fresh re-judge is stricter than 06_7. Rank 4-6 were marked functional_hit in 06_7 (0.76/0.72/0.78) but on re-judge they fall short of 0.7 because each provides only a component (measurement or problem-statement) and not the candidate's combined stylistic-aging loss + iterative weight-wiring schedule. No keyword overlap with the LLM-side content_words on any result. Verdict PASS (novelty preserved).
